title: epidendrum cornutum
intro: Epidendrum cornutum, also known as the horned epidendrum, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum cornutum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, or dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
